title: premna obtusifolia var. serratifolia
intro: Premna obtusifolia var. serratifolia, also known as the serrated Premna or small-leaf Premna, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Premna obtusifolia var. serratifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Premna obtusifolia var. serratifolia can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
